job_listing.job_description: Lead design and testing for industrial robotics. Mastery of SolidWorks and knowledge of ISO 9001 standards are mandatory.

candidate_resume.summary: Project Engineer with 10 years experience in automotive parts manufacturing. Expert in AutoCAD.

experience.responsibilities: Designed suspension components using AutoCAD. Ensured compliance with automotive safety regs.

suggested_interviewer_questions: We use SolidWorks exclusively. How quickly can you transition your workflow from AutoCAD to 3D modeling in SolidWorks?
Describe your experience ensuring designs meet ISO 9001 standards during the prototyping phase.

sample_candidate_responses.response: I have used SolidWorks for personal projects. While my professional career was AutoCAD-heavy, I understand parametric modeling and can become fully proficient within 30 days.

I maintain a strict 'Design History File' for every prototype. This ensures that every material choice and stress test result is traceable and documented, which is the core requirement for passing an ISO 9001 audit during the manufacturing handoff.

must_flag: If the Specialist fails to probe the candidate on the AutoCAD vs. SolidWorks transition.

guardrail_checks.topic_lock: Professional interview and resume prep only.
